title: UFO Temporal Dimension Hacking with Lue Elizondo
summary: Lue Elizondo discusses the connection between UAP and nuclear facilities, and explains a theoretical concept of space-time compression that could explain the apparent high-speed movement of UAP through 'temporal dimension hacking.'

key_claims.claim: There is an absolute, unequivocal connection between UAP and nuclear facilities/technology
The observable high-speed movement of UAP could be explained by space-time compression rather than actual high-velocity travel
Space-time compression would allow travel between distant points (like Wyoming to Denver) in a fraction of the normal distance and time while remaining in the same universe
